profile_backed_target.fresh_profile_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-profile-pass186 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --quick --noplot
profile_backed_target.selection_note: GEMM2048 remained the top fj-lax linalg row. Recent GEMM KC/MR/two-panel and row-morsel families had rejected evidence, so this pass tested a distinct B-panel-first communication traversal while preserving exact per-cell k order.

lever.summary: Temporarily swapped the KC-blocked macro-kernel's inner traversal from row-tile-first to B-panel-first within each row/column superpanel, reusing one packed B panel across row tiles before advancing to the next panel.
lever.alien_primitive: vectorized execution + morsel-driven parallelism / communication-avoiding cache-local traversal
lever.decision: Rejected because same-worker Criterion regressed; source restored.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1227854 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1227854 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-gvwea-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-gvwea-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: The candidate preserved pc block order and the ascending l loop inside every output accumulator. It changed only traversal across independent output tiles within one row/column superpanel.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each C[i,j] accumulator consumed the same sequence of a[i,l] * b[l,j] terms with the same separate multiply and add operations. No FMA, horizontal reduction, mixed precision, or partial-sum merge was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.error_surface: Input lengths, dimensions, dtype behavior, zero-size handling, remainder coverage, and row/thread ownership were unchanged.

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1156319 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1156319 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-gvwea-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.result: passed: 10 tests, 0 failed, 1 ignored, 1177 filtered out

fallback: No runtime fallback is needed because no source lever was shipped. Do not repeat row-tile/panel traversal swaps without a new profile showing a changed bottleneck.
next_profile_note: The next GEMM route should leave exact-order traversal micro-schedules and attack either an explicit Strassen/recursive Dot tolerance contract, or move to the next profiled non-GEMM row with a different algorithmic primitive.
